title: Pratham Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Pratham Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Pratham Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Pratham Education:
Pratham Education is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pratham Education!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
